reviews.comment:
Los empleados bastante lerdos, llego una mujer , na a cargar nafta, y todos hacían chistes, iban venían y no atendían. Si están renovando la vista de las estaciones, traten de educar a los playeros para que atiendan más rápido a los clientes

(Translated by Google)
The employees were quite slow. A woman arrived to fill up her car, and they were all joking around, walking back and forth, and not helping her. If they're renovating the stations, they should try to train the attendants to serve customers faster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMTQyZ0FREAE
